briefdescription.para: Id of each compt in each spine.

detaileddescription.para: Ids of all spines on each compt, looked up by segIndex of compt.

briefdescription.para: Id of the Dsolve for the head compt.
Id of stoich associated with each PSD. Typically all the same.
Map to look up Seg index from Id of associated compt.
Id of compartment in each Seg entry, below.
Id of the Dsolve for the PSD compt.

detaileddescription.para: Holder for spine operations. Contains pointer to current Neuron.

briefdescription.para: Look up seg index of parent compartment, from index of spine.
Id of stoich associated with each spine. Typically all the same.
looks up spine/psd mesh index from FieldIndex of selected spine.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, const vector< string > &line, vector< ObjId > &elist, vector< double > &val)
memberdef.name: buildElist

briefdescription.para: Fills up vector of segments. First entry is soma.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< ObjId > &elist, const string &expn, vector< double > &val) const
memberdef.name: evalExprForElist

detaileddescription.para: Evaluates expn for every CompartmentBase entry in elist. Pushes value, length and dia for each elist entry into the 'val' vector.
Digest the path and the math expression to obtain an elist of compartments that satisfy both criteria. The argument 'line' has path followed by the math expression, separated by a space.

Digest the path and the math expression to obtain all the values pertaining to the elements in the path. There are nuParser::numVal * elist.size() entries. The argument 'line' has path followed by the math expression, separated by a space.

memberdef.argsstring: (const string &name, const vector< ObjId > &elist, const vector< double > &val, const vector< string > &line)
memberdef.name: installMechanism

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< ObjId > &elist, const vector< double > &val, const vector< string > &line)
memberdef.name: installSpines

inbodydescription.para: Now fill in allSpinesPerCompt_ vector. It was allocated in buildSegmentTree, right after segId_ was filled.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< ObjId > &elist, const vector< double > &val, vector< unsigned int > &seglistIndex, vector< unsigned int > &elistIndex, vector< double > &pos, const vector< string > &line) const
memberdef.name: makeSpacingDistrib

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int spineNum, double lenScale, double diaScale) const
memberdef.name: scaleBufAndRates

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int spineNum, double len, double dia) const
memberdef.name: scaleHeadDiffusion

briefdescription.para: Scale the diffusion parameters due to a change in the head dimensions.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int spineNum, double len, double dia) const
memberdef.name: scaleShaftDiffusion

briefdescription.para: Scale the diffusion parameters due to a change in the shaft dimensions.

inbodydescription.para: Ignore it. the number of spines is set when we build the tree.

briefdescription.para: Fills up vector of segments. First entry is soma.

detaileddescription.para: The Neuron class to hold the Compartment class elements.
